results.term: Hello, thanks for offering to help.  My sister is ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Hello, thanks for offering to help.  My sister is battling with heroin addiction, and I am raising her children.  It's quite a bit of pressure and responsibility.

results.term: She has been in and out of rehab, and I see no end...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: She has been in and out of rehab, and I see no end to her problems, other than a tragic one.  Thankfully, the children are adjusting to it, probably because they are happy just to be in a stable environment.

results.term: I have a romantic partner who helps.  I also have ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: I have a romantic partner who helps.  I also have two of my own relatively young children.

results.term: Thanks for being sympathetic and for the words of ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Thanks for being sympathetic and for the words of encouragement.  Yes, needless to say, Child Protective Services were involved, and I was granted Foster Parent status.  I'm sure your friend went down that road, sadly.

results.term: Have you ever seen the video by the artist known a...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Have you ever seen the video by the artist known as NF called "How Could You Leave Us?"  I'm afraid that's what's next for these kids.

results.term: They all get along famously.   You can find that v...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: They all get along famously.   You can find that video on YouTube.  It's a true story of how his mother died from heroin addiction.  It's a powerful song.

results.term: Hopefully, you never have to experience it.  Heroi...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Hopefully, you never have to experience it.  Heroin (opioids) just grabs hold of people and doesn't let go.

results.term: Thank you.  One piece of good news.  Her son went ...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Thank you.  One piece of good news.  Her son went from failing most of his classes to making Honor Roll this trimester - that's what his advisor tells me.

results.term: You've been really helpful and considerate.  Chatt...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: You've been really helpful and considerate.  Chatting with you certainly made me feel better.  I think we can end the support session at this juncture if you've met your session requirements.

results.term: Thanks so, much.  Have a great holiday and we'll t...

turn_info.speaker: seeker
turn_info.content: Thanks so, much.  Have a great holiday and we'll try to do the same.
